name: the-invisible-users
description: Designing the Web for AI Agents and Everyone Else - A practical guide to the collision between modern web design and AI agents

scripts.illustrations:generate: cd invisible-users/illustrations && for svg in chapter-*.svg; do png="${svg%.svg}.png"; echo "Converting $svg to $png..."; magick convert -density 300 -background white "$svg" "$png" 2>/dev/null || convert -density 300 -background white "$svg" "$png"; done && echo "✓ All PNG illustrations generated"
scripts.pdf:html: pandoc invisible-users/executive-summary.md invisible-users/preface.md invisible-users/chapter-*.md invisible-users/Glossary.md invisible-users/glossary-simplified.md -o the-invisible-users.html --resource-path=invisible-users --standalone --toc --toc-depth=2 --metadata title='The Invisible Users' --metadata subtitle='Designing the Web for AI Agents and Everyone Else' --metadata author='Tom Cranstoun' --metadata date='December 2025' && echo '✓ HTML generated: the-invisible-users.html (open and print to PDF using ⌘+P)'
scripts.pdf:generate: pandoc invisible-users/executive-summary.md invisible-users/preface.md invisible-users/chapter-*.md invisible-users/Glossary.md invisible-users/glossary-simplified.md -o the-invisible-users.pdf --resource-path=invisible-users --pdf-engine=xelatex --toc --toc-depth=2 -V geometry:margin=1in -V fontsize=11pt -V documentclass=book -V papersize=a4 -V linkcolor=blue --metadata title='The Invisible Users' --metadata subtitle='Designing the Web for AI Agents and Everyone Else' --metadata author='Tom Cranstoun' --metadata date='December 2025' && echo '✓ PDF generated: the-invisible-users.pdf'
scripts.pdf:simple: pandoc invisible-users/executive-summary.md invisible-users/preface.md invisible-users/chapter-*.md invisible-users/Glossary.md invisible-users/glossary-simplified.md -o the-invisible-users-simple.pdf --resource-path=invisible-users --pdf-engine=xelatex --toc --toc-depth=2 -V geometry:margin=1in -V fontsize=11pt -V linkcolor=blue && echo '✓ Simple PDF generated: the-invisible-users-simple.pdf'

author: Tom Cranstoun
